title: Visit of the Socialist Youth to Parliament and PS Headquarters
excerpt: On March 19, 2026, the Socialist Youth of Marinha Grande, Leiria, Ansião, Pombal, and Bombarral, led by the Leiria Federation of the Socialist Youth, visited the Assembly of the Republic, where it was possible to attend the Plenary Session, and later visit the Headquarters of the Socialist Party.

title: Letter of Repudiation to the Government
excerpt: Letter of repudiation to the Government of Portugal, especially to minister Manuel Castro Almeida due to the accusations made.

title: Thank You Note
excerpt: Thank you note to all who contributed to help Marinha Grande rebuild stronger.

excerpt: A public note about Kristin Storm.

title: Thank You, Libélula Theater
excerpt: A brief thank-you note to Libélula Theater for this opportunity.

title: Today You Would Be 50 Years Old
excerpt: Dear uncle, today you would have been celebrating your long-awaited 50th birthday.

title: Thank You For Everything, Dear Uncle
